summary: Made surgical continuity edits at the chapter entry so Chapter 12 now follows Chapter 11's night exit as an overnight search while preserving the existing handoff into Chapter 13.
edits: Specified that the market opening occurs the next morning.
Changed the search duration from since first light to all night into first light.
Reframed the hatch recollection to match a dark street rather than pre-dawn.
Updated Lucien's later callback so it refers to daylight arriving instead of coming out that morning.
